content.json:
# Claims GenAI Tracing Workbook
Claim-first monitoring across traces, requests, and dependencies.

content.query: union isfuzzy=true traces, requests, dependencies | where timestamp > ago(24h) | extend Payload = strcat(tostring(message), ' ', tostring(name), ' ', tostring(target), ' ', tostring(data), ' ', tostring(customDimensions)) | extend ClaimId = extract(@'(CLM-\d{3})', 1, Payload), AgentName = extract(@'(claims-triage-agent|claims-decision-agent|tracing-test-agent)', 1, Payload), Decision = extract(@'(APPROVE|REQUEST DOCUMENTS|INVESTIGATE|DENY)', 1, Payload), Urgency = extract(@'(IMMEDIATE|WITHIN 48H|STANDARD)', 1, Payload) | where isnotempty(ClaimId) or isnotempty(AgentName) | summarize TraceCount = count(), Operations = dcount(operation_Id), LastSeen = max(timestamp) by ClaimId, AgentName, Decision, Urgency | order by TraceCount desc
